chapter.summary: Source text for 1 John 1 in Eastern Greek Orthodox Bible.

verses.text: with our eyes, what we saw and what our hands touched, [this is our message] concerning the word of life.
The Lifea was revealed and we have seen, we testify and we proclaim to you the life, the eternal life which was with the Father and which was revealed to us.
What we have seen and heard, this is what we proclaim to you, so that you also may have communionb with us. Truly, our communion is with the Father and with his Son Jesus Christ.
We write these things to you so that our joy may be fulfilled!
This is the message which we have heard from him and which we now announce to you: that God is light, and in him there is no darkness at all.
If we say that we have communion with him and yet walk in the darkness, we lie – we do not tell the truth.
But if we walk in the light as he is in the light, then we do have communion with one another and the blood of his Son Jesus Christ cleanses us from all sin.
If we say that we have no sin, we deceive ourselves and the truth is not in us.
If we confess our sins, he is faithful and righteous so that he will forgive us our sins and cleanse us from all unrighteousness.
If we say that we have not sinned, we make him a liar and his word is not in us.
